title: phyllanthus yaouhensis
intro: Phyllanthus yaouhensis, also known as Yaohou, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, characterized by its small, greenish-yellow flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus yaouhensis include the ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tonics, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
